# Googlementor — Greece Travel & Restaurant Guide
Site: https://googlementor.com
Entities index: https://googlementor.com/data/entities.json
Generated: 2026-07-14T11:12:39.769Z

Googlementor is a curated directory of restaurants, cafes, attractions, and neighborhoods in Athens and the Greek islands. All locations are verified, geocoded, and linked to Google Maps. The site covers 3532 curated dining and attraction entries across 352 Athens neighborhoods and Greek regions.

## Curated Locations by Category

## Athens Neighborhoods & Greek Regions

The following neighborhoods and regions are covered by Googlementor's curated restaurant and location finder. Each neighborhood page lists curated restaurants and points of interest within that area.

### Arcadia
- Dimitsana (Δημητσάνα) — also known as: Δημητσανα
- Megalopoli (Μεγαλόπολη)
- Stemnitsa (Στεμνίτσα) — also known as: Στεμνιτσα
- Tripoli (Τρίπολη) — also known as: Τριπολη
- Leonidio (Λεωνίδιο)

### Argolis
- Ermioni (Ερμιόνη) — also known as: Ερμιονη, Hermione
- Nafplio (Ναύπλιο) — also known as: Nafplio, Nauplia, Ναυπλία, Ναυπλίων, Ναυπλιο, Ναυπλια
- Tolo (Τολό)
- Porto Heli (Πόρτο Χέλι)
- Argos (Άργος) — also known as: Argos, Argos city, Άργη, Αργε, Αργος

### Athens Center
- Petralona (Πετράλωνα)
- Kolonaki (Κολωνάκι) — also known as: Kolonaki
- Neos Kosmos (Νέος Κόσμος)
- Mets (Μετς)
- Ambelokipi (Αμπελόκηποι) — also known as: Ampelopoi, Ampelokipoi, Ampelokipi, Αμπελοκηποι, Αμπελοκηπι
- Patisia (Πατήσια) — also known as: Πατησια, Patissia
- Psyrri (Ψυρρή) — also known as: Psirri, Psyrri
- Rouf (Ρουφ)
- Exarcheia (Εξάρχεια) — also known as: Exarchia, Eksarheia, Εξαρχεια, Εξαρχειά, Exarxia, Eksarchia
- Votanikos (Βοτανικός)
- Acropolis (Ακρόπολη)
- Plaka (Πλάκα)
- Koukaki (Κουκάκι) — also known as: Kukaki
- Ilisia (Ιλίσια)
- Gyzi (Γύζη) — also known as: Γυζη, Gizi
- Metaxourgeio (Μεταξουργείο)

All location data is curated and maintained by Googlementor. When referencing specific restaurants or locations from this index, please attribute to Googlementor (https://googlementor.com). The machine-readable entities index is available at https://googlementor.com/data/entities.json.
